meta.title: Inflection points, priced by the crowd
meta.subtitle: An experiment: each PL R&D inflection point mapped to the closest live prediction market on Polymarket / Kalshi. Where a market exists, the crowd's probability is a running scoreboard for our bets. Where none exists, the gap is itself a signal of how early or contrarian the bet is.
meta.disclaimer: Prototype for discussion. Odds are fetched live from public prediction-market APIs and are proxies, not exact restatements of our inflection points. Not investment advice; nothing here endorses gambling.

mappings.inflectionPoint: A decentralized / open compute network trains a model competitive with the hyperscalers' frontier.

market.question: Will an open-weights (Chinese) model be the best AI model by Dec 31?
market.note: Open-weights momentum is the best available proxy for open/distributed compute reaching the frontier.

mappings.inflectionPoint: Robotics datasets and embodied models reach the behavioral repertoire needed for real-world deployment.

market.question: Will Tesla release a consumer Optimus humanoid by Dec 31, 2026?
market.note: Commercial humanoid release is a visible downstream marker of embodied-AI data maturity. Figure F.03 reliability markets are a second proxy.

mappings.inflectionPoint: Autonomous agents coordinate and transact across organizations without human intermediation.

market.question: No direct market yet — agents already trade ON Polymarket, but none prices agent-to-agent economies.
market.note: A genuine white space. Could be worth proposing/seeding such a market.

mappings.inflectionPoint: A 100M+ service identifies users without state/platform KYC via self-sovereign identity.

market.question: Over 30M humans verified on World Network by Dec 31?
market.note: Proof-of-human adoption at scale is the clearest live analogue to the portable-identity inflection.

mappings.inflectionPoint: Frontier AI + major institutions adopt cryptographic content provenance as a baseline.

market.question: No clean market yet (EU AI Act Art. 50 enforcement, Aug 2026, is a candidate to track).
market.note: C2PA / SynthID adoption is measurable but not yet a liquid market — another white space.

mappings.inflectionPoint: An FDA-cleared BCI opens a third-party app layer, normalizing elective implantation.

market.question: Will Neuralink's valuation hit $75B by Dec 31?
market.note: Valuation / FDA-milestone markets track BCI momentum; a dedicated FDA-clearance market would be the direct measure.

mappings.inflectionPoint: A nation-state runs core systems (identity, payments, registries) on crypto rails.

market.question: Over 30M humans verified on World Network by Dec 31?
market.note: World becoming a mandated digital-identity layer is one of our own examples; shares the World market as a proxy.

mappings.inflectionPoint: A city/jurisdiction adopts crypto-native governance; a billion-dollar DePIN climate business emerges.

market.question: No liquid market yet for network-state governance adoption or DePIN climate scale.
market.note: Long-horizon, illiquid themes — the absence of a market underlines how contrarian these bets are.
